title: Trisetaria antonii-josephii
taxonomy: Trisetaria antonii-josephii is a species within the family Poaceae and is classified as a type of grass. It belongs to the tribe Poeae and is native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. The genus Trisetaria is closely related to the genus Phalaris and is part of the subfamily Pooideae. Trisetaria antonii-josephii is a perennial grass and is often found growing in dry, open areas. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Trisetaria antonii-josephii from other similar grass species.
